news.title: Twisha Sharma's Mother-In-Law Giribala Singh Gets 3rd Notice For Questioning
news.excerpt: Giribala Singh was granted anticipatory bail on May 15 after furnishing a bond of Rs 50,000.

news.title: Siddaramaiah Or DK Shivakumar? Congress 'May' Finally Take Karnataka Call
news.excerpt: DK Shivakumar and Siddaramaiah may soon to called to Delhi for meeting

news.title: UPSC Prelims 2026: DMRC To Start Metro Services Early On Select Lines This Sunday
news.excerpt: UPSC Prelims 2026: DMRC said trains on select lines will run at 15-minute intervals between 6am and 7am.

news.title: Murder, Parole, Then Bollywood Career: Gujarat Actor Arrested After 12 Years
news.excerpt: Hemant Vaishnav was serving his sentence in Mehsana Jail when he was granted 30 days of parole.

news.title: Woman Dies 2 Years After Botched Kidney, Doctors Took Left Instead Of Right
news.excerpt: A 56-year-old woman died after doctors mistakenly removed her healthy left kidney instead of the diseased right one in 2012.

news.title: Victims have long been ‘pushed into a corner’, says Supreme Court
news.excerpt: The top court was hearing a plea filed by an accused in a chit fund scam seeking the clubbing of FIRs registered across multiple States
